description: User scrolls down the Moneysmart home loan page to review loan features and next steps.
frame_description: The user is at the bottom of the Moneysmart 'Choosing a home loan' page, looking at 'Up next in Home loans' cards.

description: User switches to the browser tab containing the user testing task instructions.
frame_description: The screen switches to a white page with text detailing the study tasks.

description: User switches back to the Moneysmart browser tab.
frame_description: The screen returns to the Moneysmart website.

description: User navigates to a Google search results page for 'home loans comparison'.
frame_description: Google search results for home loans are displayed.

description: User clicks on the search result for Unloan.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'Unloan' sponsored result.

description: The Unloan homepage loads.
page_title: Unloan | The value for money home loan
frame_description: The Unloan homepage with a dark background and 'The value for money home loan' headline appears.

description: User scrolls down the Unloan homepage to view loan options.
frame_description: The page scrolls down to reveal 'Live in' and 'Invest' loan cards.

description: User clicks on the 'I'm Refinancing' option.
frame_description: The user selects the refinancing path in the application flow.

description: The UI updates to show the next question: 'What's the purpose of your loan?'.
frame_description: A new section appears below the refinancing selection.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: The user proceeds to the next step of the application.

description: The 'Before you begin' page loads.
frame_description: A checklist page appears with requirements for property, borrowers, and financials.

description: User clicks 'Continue' on the 'Before you begin' page.
frame_description: The user confirms they meet the initial criteria.

description: The 'Let's find your property' page loads.
frame_description: A form page appears asking for property address and details.

description: User clicks into the 'What's your property address?' input field.
frame_description: The address field is focused, ready for text input.

description: User types '11 d' into the address field.
frame_description: Characters appear in the address field as the user types.

description: An address autocomplete dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of suggested addresses appears below the input field.

description: User continues typing 'wyer st' to refine the address search.
frame_description: The user types more characters and the suggestions update.

description: User selects '11 Dwyer Street, Cavendish VIC 3314' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks a specific address from the dropdown list.

description: User clicks the 'Property type' dropdown.
frame_description: The user activates the dropdown to select a property type.

description: The property type dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: A list of options (House, Townhouse, etc.) is displayed.

description: User selects 'House' from the property type menu.
frame_description: The user chooses 'House' and the menu closes.

description: User clicks into the 'Estimated property value' input field.
frame_description: The property value field is focused.

description: User types '800000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The value '800,000' is entered into the field.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user submits the property details.

description: The 'Tell us about your loan' page loads.
frame_description: A new form page appears asking for loan details and borrower information.

description: User clicks the 'Two of us' radio button for 'Who is this loan for?'.
frame_description: The user indicates there are two borrowers.

description: Input fields for borrower names appear on the screen.
frame_description: Two text fields for first names are dynamically added to the form.

description: User types 'serene' into the first name field.
frame_description: The user enters their name.

description: User types 'ned' into the co-borrower's first name field.
frame_description: The user enters the second borrower's name.

description: User hovers over the 'Borrow more money' radio button.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Borrow more money' option.

description: User clicks the 'Save money' radio button.
frame_description: The user selects 'Save money' as the reason for refinancing.

description: User clicks into the refinance amount input field.
frame_description: The amount field is focused.

description: User types '500000' into the refinance amount field.
frame_description: The value '500,000' is entered.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the form.
frame_description: The user submits the loan details to proceed.
